title: Gaussian decimation over-blurs (a/sigma 4.5-5.8 vs FCP 6.09 at amount>=20) — needs exact HGBlur fastDecimateDown successive-2x + inner-sigma variance comp
goal: decimatedGaussianBlur over-blurs at every decimated amount (level too aggressive + single large-factor bilinear resample aliases and adds 0.324*F variance + inner radius rounding). Reverse-engineer FCP's exact HGBlur fastDecimateDown/Up (successive 2x box/mip reduction, variance-correct — FCP holds a/sigma=6.09 at all amounts). Implement successive-2x decimate + variance-compensated inner sigma. Gate-verify on Bloom/Center_Reveal/360_Gaussian_Blur (use real Gaussian amounts) with 0 regression. Do NOT ship an unverified variance hack (naive comp lands a/sigma~4.7-5.7). Evidence: engine step-edge a/sigma = 5.79(amt20) 4.50(amt50) 5.45(amt75) 4.50(amt100) 4.59(amt600) vs headless 6.09 all. See gaussian-blur.ts [P2-GB4].
